✅ Why This Works:
• Creates a timeline of literary influence.
• Encourages students to see literature as a response to history.
• Prompts creative speculation about future storytelling.

5️⃣ RPG System & XP: Should XP Be Redeemable for Academic Perks?

✔ Yes, but sparingly.
✔ XP can unlock privileges, not replace grades.

🔹 Unlockable Academic Perks
• XP Level 5: One-time deadline extension.
• XP Level 10: Drop lowest discussion grade.
• XP Level 15: Swap a written assignment for a creative submission.

✅ Why This Works:
• Avoids grade inflation.
• Rewards engagement but keeps academic integrity.

6️⃣ Peer Review: Should Feedback Have a Ranking System?
